issues.description: AttachDon should target rested DON cards only, not all DON cards. Current DSL lacks 'rested' filter requirement.

FlipLife is incorrect action. Text says 'add up to 1 card from opponent's Life cards to owner's hand' — this should be a conditional action that only triggers if opponent has 3+ Life cards, using appropriate action (likely custom or multi-step logic not represented).
Second action lacks condition 'if your opponent has 3 or more Life cards'. Currently has no conditional wrapper.
[On K.O.] effect is missing the mandatory 'You may turn 1 card from top of Life face-up' prerequisite action before the conditional Play action.
PlayFromHand filter is incomplete — missing required 'Character' type filter which is present in DSL, but the action should also be conditioned on the preceding life flip (FlipLife action missing).
